gdp_data:
Source: IMF, World Economic Outlook (April 2026). Data Type: Projections for 2026 in Nominal terms.    Gross Domestic Product (GDP) is the total monetary value of all goods and services produced and sold within a country over one year.
(Learn more)
   Nominal (or "Current") GDP reflects current prices and exchange rates, without adjustments for inflation or cost-of-living differences.
